muzzle-brake.name: Muzzle brake
muzzle-brake.effect: Rounds leave the barrel faster. The heavier muzzle makes reloads slower.

suppressor.name: Suppressor
suppressor.effect: Subsonic rounds travel more slowly but stay in flight far longer.

long-barrel.name: Long barrel
long-barrel.effect: A longer bore drives rounds out much faster, but tightens them into a thinner shot that is easier to miss with.

short-barrel.name: Short barrel
short-barrel.effect: A stubby bore handles quickly and reloads fast, giving up muzzle velocity for it.

ranged-optic.name: Ranged optic
ranged-optic.effect: Shots stay in flight much longer, so they reach targets further out.

close-optic.name: Close optic
close-optic.effect: A wide bead makes shots easier to land up close, at the cost of how far they carry.

match-trigger.name: Match trigger
match-trigger.effect: A consistent break makes every shot land a little wider. The mechanism is slower to clear on a reload.

light-trigger.name: Light trigger
light-trigger.effect: A light pull gets the weapon back into action faster, and sends rounds out slightly slower.

extended-magazine.name: Extended magazine
extended-magazine.effect: Holds half again as many rounds, and takes considerably longer to swap.

quick-magazine.name: Quick magazine
quick-magazine.effect: Swaps far faster in exchange for holding fewer rounds.

focusing-core.name: Focusing core
focusing-core.effect: Casts cost noticeably less mana, and take longer to commit before they release.

surging-core.name: Surging core
surging-core.effect: Casts commit much faster, giving opponents less warning, and burn more mana each time.

wide-focus.name: Wide focus
wide-focus.effect: Shapes a broader, slower bolt that is easier to connect with.

narrow-focus.name: Narrow focus
narrow-focus.effect: Shapes a fast, thin bolt that crosses the gap quickly and is easier to miss with.

reaching-conduit.name: Reaching conduit
reaching-conduit.effect: Bolts persist far longer before fading, at a small mana premium.

channeling-conduit.name: Channeling conduit
channeling-conduit.effect: Draws less mana per cast and sends bolts out more slowly.
